Paragraph

According to our discussion above, \(f(x) :=\int_{a}^{x} g(t)\, dt\) is differentiable \(a.e.\) on \([a, b]\) and \(f'(x)\in L^{1}[a, b]\text{.}\) This implies that \(g_{h}(x) := h^{-1}\int_{x}^{x+h} g(t)\, dt =h^{-1}(f(x+h)-f(x)) \to f'(x)\) \(a.e.\) on \([a, b]\) as \(|h|\to 0\text{.}\)
in-context
